title: Protocol Development
short_description: Design robust clinical and research protocols with clear objectives, endpoints, and analysis readiness.
content:
We partner with your team to develop statistically sound, regulator-ready protocols that align scientific intent with operational feasibility. Our approach covers objective framing, endpoint definition, inclusion and exclusion criteria, visit schedules, and risk-aware statistical thinking from day one.

The output is a clear protocol foundation that accelerates approvals and reduces downstream rework across biostatistics, medical writing, and operations.
deliverables:
• Protocol framework and endpoint mapping
  • Statistical considerations section
  • Assumption log and risk notes
  • Review-ready revision package
hero_subtitle: Build a protocol that aligns scientific intent, study operations, and analysis strategy from the first draft.
hero_benefits: ["Clarifies objectives, estimands, and endpoint hierarchy early", "Reduces amendment risk by resolving design gaps upfront", "Improves alignment across investigators, biostatistics, and operations", "Supports faster ethics and sponsor review cycles"]

title: Statistical Input in Manuscript
short_description: Provide expert statistical review and writing support for manuscripts before submission.
content:
We review manuscript drafts to strengthen statistical framing, methods transparency, results interpretation, and reviewer resilience. Feedback focuses on alignment between claims, analyses, and limitations.

This improves submission confidence and reduces revision cycles related to statistical critique.
deliverables:
• Statistical review comments
  • Methods and results edits
  • Reviewer response support
  • Submission-readiness checklist
hero_subtitle: Increase submission confidence by aligning claims, analyses, and limitations to withstand reviewer scrutiny.
hero_benefits: ["Improves statistical transparency in Methods and Results", "Reduces reviewer objections related to analysis choices", "Sharpens interpretation without overstating findings", "Supports faster and more focused revision cycles"]

title: Statistical Data Analysis Plan
short_description: Develop complete SAP documents translating protocol goals into executable statistical methods.
content:
Our Statistical Analysis Plan service converts protocol intent into an auditable and implementation-ready analysis blueprint. We define populations, handling rules, missing data strategy, model choices, sensitivity analyses, and output conventions.

This ensures your data management, programming, and reporting teams work from a unified source of truth.
deliverables:
• Comprehensive SAP document
  • Population and endpoint analysis definitions
  • Missing data and sensitivity strategy
  • Output shells alignment notes
hero_subtitle: Create a decision-ready SAP that removes ambiguity and standardizes execution across data, programming, and reporting teams.
hero_benefits: ["Defines populations, estimands, and model strategy clearly", "Pre-specifies handling for missing data and protocol deviations", "Improves reproducibility and audit readiness", "Reduces analysis rework during lock and reporting"]

title: Sample Size & Power Analysis
short_description: Quantify sample requirements and power trade-offs for defensible and cost-efficient study designs.
content:
We perform rigorous sample size and power analyses tailored to your endpoint type, expected effect size, design constraints, and attrition expectations. Outputs are decision-oriented and explainable for protocol committees and ethics submissions.

Where uncertainty is high, we include scenario analyses to guide practical enrollment planning.
deliverables:
• Sample size assumptions table
  • Power scenarios and interpretation memo
  • Dropout-adjusted enrollment recommendation
  • Design option comparison summary
hero_subtitle: Make enrollment decisions with confidence using scenario-based power planning tailored to your endpoint and constraints.
hero_benefits: ["Quantifies trade-offs between effect size, power, and feasibility", "Improves budget and timeline planning", "Supports ethics and grant justification with defensible logic", "Flags design sensitivity to dropout and noncompliance"]

title: TLF Development (Tables, Listings, Figures)
short_description: Design publication-ready and regulatory-friendly TLF shells and specifications for reporting workflows.
content:
We create standardized TLF structures that map directly to study objectives, SAP definitions, and stakeholder reporting expectations. The service improves consistency between analysis, programming, and final reporting.

From shell design to traceability notes, we ensure each output supports interpretation and decision-making.
deliverables:
• TLF shell package
  • Numbering and labeling conventions
  • Metadata and traceability notes
  • Programming handoff checklist
hero_subtitle: Standardize your reporting outputs with TLF specifications that align SAP definitions and stakeholder expectations.
hero_benefits: ["Improves consistency across outputs and reporting cycles", "Reduces programming ambiguity and rework", "Enhances readability for clinical and executive audiences", "Strengthens traceability from analysis to reporting"]

title: Research Methodology
short_description: Strengthen study methodology across design, bias control, and analytical strategy alignment.
content:
We help teams refine overall methodological architecture so that design, sampling, measurement, and analysis choices remain coherent and defensible. This includes support for observational, experimental, and mixed-method contexts.

The result is stronger internal validity, clearer causal reasoning, and improved review outcomes.
deliverables:
• Methodology review and gap report
  • Design refinement recommendations
  • Bias and confounder mitigation plan
  • Method section drafting support
target_audience:
• Academic researchers
  • Policy and social science teams
  • Clinical methodologists
hero_subtitle: Refine methodology choices across design, measurement, and inference to produce more defensible evidence.
hero_benefits: ["Improves internal validity and interpretability", "Reduces bias through explicit mitigation planning", "Aligns design decisions with feasible analysis strategy", "Supports stronger peer-review and stakeholder confidence"]

title: Report Writing
short_description: Convert technical analyses into clear, decision-oriented reports for academic, clinical, and business stakeholders.
content:
We provide structured report writing support that translates complex statistical outputs into clear narratives with defensible interpretation. Reports are tailored to stakeholder context while preserving methodological rigor.

We can support full report drafting or targeted sections such as methods, results, and discussion.
deliverables:
• Structured report draft
  • Results narrative with statistical interpretation
  • Figure/table integration guidance
  • Revision support rounds
hero_subtitle: Deliver reports that are scientifically rigorous, easy to scan, and tailored to technical and non-technical stakeholders.
hero_benefits: ["Translates statistical outputs into clear narratives", "Improves decision speed for leadership and partners", "Maintains methodological integrity in plain language", "Reduces revision cycles during stakeholder review"]
